metadata.description: Default term-level implementations of Either functions for the Hydra interpreter.

literal.string: Interpreter-friendly case analysis for Either terms.
Interpreter-friendly lefts for list of Either terms.
Interpreter-friendly mapOptional for Either (traverse over an optional).
Interpreter-friendly mapSet for Either (traverse over Set).
Interpreter-friendly partitionEithers for list of Either terms.
Interpreter-friendly rights for list of Either terms.
